KV Cache Eviction Strategies

Budget = 8 slots · Total sequence = 24 tokens · Step through to watch each policy's decisions

Speed: t = 0 / 24
H2O — Heavy Hitter Oracle
Tracks cumulative attention scores. Evicts the token with the lowest score when the budget is exceeded. Heavy-hitter tokens (high attention) persist; low-importance tokens are evicted.
Cache: 0/8 Evicted: 0
StreamingLLM — Sink + Recent
Always keeps the first Ks=3 "sink" tokens (amber) and the most recent Kr=5 tokens (green). Everything in between is evicted. O(1) memory, infinite streaming.
Cache: 0/8 Evicted: 0
SnapKV — Cluster + Recent
After an observation window, votes on prefix importance via pooled attention scores. Keeps top-4 prefix tokens (purple) + 4 most recent (green). Per-layer granularity.
Cache: 0/8 Evicted: 0
In cache (normal)
Sink token (StreamingLLM)
Important prefix (SnapKV)
Evicted
